urdu transliteration text:
Yeh Khat Mein Shah Ne Likha
Habib Aa Jao
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Imam Husayn (a) wrote in a letter, O Habib please come to me

urdu transliteration text:
Tumhara Dost Hai Tanha
Habib Aa Jao.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Your friend is alone,O Habib please come to me

urdu transliteration text:
Shaheed Kaise Howa
Woh Batao Gaye Aa Kar.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How was he martyred,please come and tell me

urdu transliteration text:
Please come and inform me about Hazrat Muslim’s situation
Tum Haal-e-Muslim-e-Bekas
Sunao Gaye Aa Kar.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Ruqaiya Takti Hai Rasta Habib Aa Jao.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Ruqayyah is waiting anxiously for you O Habib please come to me

urdu transliteration text:
Bata Raha Tha Osse Koi Bhi Nahi Hai Mera.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Someone was telling her that I am left with no helper

urdu transliteration text:
Bibi Zaynab (a) cried “Habibwill definitely come”
Tu Bolin Sani-e-Zahra Habib Aaye Ga.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Hai Oss Ko Tum Pe Bharosa  Habib Aa Jao.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: She has complete faith in you, O Habib please come to me

urdu transliteration text:
Woh Jab Yeh Sunti Hai Kofay Se Aa Rahe Hain Shaqi.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When she hears that enemies are coming from Kufa

urdu transliteration text:
Tu Pochti Hai Hamara Bhi Aaye Ga Koi.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: She asks if any supporters will also come to help us?

urdu transliteration text:
Duaein De Gi Sakina Habib Aa Jao.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Sakina will pray for you, O Habib please come to me

urdu transliteration text:
Mujhe Hai Yaad Woh Lamha Jo Rab Ki Marzi Se.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I still remember the time when with the permission of The Lord...

urdu transliteration text:
Tum Ho Ke Zinda Meri Baat Sunne Aaye The
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: You came back to life when I called you

urdu transliteration text:
Bula Raha Hoon Dobara Habib Aa Jao.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I am calling u again, O Habib please come to me

urdu transliteration text:
Dar-e-Batool(SA) Dobara Jalaya Jaye Ga.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The door of Batool will be burnt once again

urdu transliteration text:
Tumhare Dost Pe Khanjar Chalaya Jaye Ga.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: A dagger will slit the throat of your friend

urdu transliteration text:
Nahi Hai Waqt Zyada Habib Aa Jao.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: There is not much time left, O Habib please come to me
